entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: Pennisetum glaucum [L.] R. Br., the crop studied for disease resistance

entities.name: DOWNY MILDEW
entities.description: The pathogen causing epidemics and production losses in pearl millet

entities.name: DOWNY MILDEW RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of pearl millet to resist downy mildew (DMR)

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where downy mildew epidemics caused production losses

entities.name: GUJARAT
entities.description: One of the Indian states from which pathogen isolates were obtained

entities.name: HARYANA
entities.description: One of the Indian states from which pathogen isolates were obtained

entities.name: RAJASTHAN
entities.description: One of the Indian states from which pathogen isolates were obtained

entities.name: QTL MAPPING
entities.description: The process of identifying quantitative trait loci controlling DMR

entities.name: LINKAGE MAP
entities.description: A genetic map constructed to identify QTL positions

entities.name: F7 RIL POPULATION
entities.description: A mapping population of 295 recombinant inbred lines used in the study

entities.name: MAPMAKER/EXP
entities.description: Software version 3.0b used to construct the skeleton genetic linkage map

entities.name: POLYMORPHIC LOCI
entities.description: 39 scorable markers used to construct the linkage map

entities.name: DMR QTL
entities.description: Quantitative trait loci identified on linkage groups 1, 3, and 4 controlling downy mildew resistance

entities.name: AIMP 92901-P03
entities.description: A resistant donor parent providing resistant alleles for DMR QTLs

entities.name: 81 B-P13
entities.description: A susceptible parent used in the plant cross to create the mapping population

entities.name: MARKER-ASSISTED SELECTION
entities.description: A technique used for improving DMR of elite pearl millet hybrid parental lines

entities.name: POLYMORPHIC FLANKING MARKERS
entities.description: Markers from donor parent AIMP 92901-P03 used in marker-assisted selection
